Tests if an object has a property named "prop1" using `hasOwnProperty`.

# Purpose
This code defines an object `obj` with three properties: `prop1`, `prop2`, and `prop3`. The property `prop1` is assigned the numeric value `5`, `prop2` is assigned the string `"qwe"`, and `prop3` is assigned the `Boolean` function. The code then uses an `assert` statement to verify that the object `obj` has a property named `prop1`. This script provides narrow functionality, primarily for testing or demonstration purposes, to confirm the existence of a specific property within an object.
